must.expr: ((not(.='all-from-me')) or ((.='all-from-me') and (not(../work-mode='bd-mode')) and (not(../work-mode='b-vsi')) and (not(../work-mode='i-vsi')) and (not(../work-mode='i-vsi-p2p')) and (not(../work-mode='i-vsi-b-evpn-interworking'))))

. ='false' or
